rules_locked.data_scope: JSON is strictly forward-looking (week start and beyond). Ongoing multi-day events may be listed if the end date is within the current week.
rules_locked.venue_regulars: Full core venue ecosystem must always remain present.
rules_locked.venue_specials: All future-dated events retained. Specials are kept clean (no extra commentary).
rules_locked.sports: Thunder schedule retained through end of season. OU basketball + softball + baseball included.
rules_locked.thunder_format: Opponent listed by city only (no team name).
rules_locked.sports_format: No venue tags in sports schedules.
rules_locked.revenue_filter_rule: Only include events that are likely to drive paid Big Red Connect activity (ticketed shows, major sports, casino concerts, high-attendance expos, and established nightlife venues/partners). Avoid low-signal/niche additions unless they are confirmed partners or clearly high-impact.
